steps.title: Substitute x = -4 into the function
steps.content: We have h(x) = 6|x| and need to find h(-4). Substitute x = -4 directly: $$h(-4) = 6|-4|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value and multiply
steps.content: The absolute value of -4 is 4. Now multiply: $$h(-4) = 6 \cdot 4 = 24$$ That matches Choice D — 24.
